/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wall -Werror -DOPENFHE_VERSION=1.4.0 -Wno-parentheses -O3 -DMATHBACKEND=4 -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libOPENFHEbinfhe.so.1 -o ../../lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.so.1.4.0 CMakeFiles/binfheobj.dir/lib/binfhe-base-scheme.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binfheobj.dir/lib/binfhe-constants-impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binfheobj.dir/lib/binfhecontext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binfheobj.dir/lib/lwe-pke.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binfheobj.dir/lib/rgsw-acc-cggi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binfheobj.dir/lib/rgsw-acc-dm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binfheobj.dir/lib/rgsw-acc-lmkcdey.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binfheobj.dir/lib/rgsw-acc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binfheobj.dir/lib/rgsw-cryptoparameters.cpp.o   -L/opt/xilinx/xrt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/xilinx/xrt/lib:/home/CONNECT/xmeng027/work/HKS-Accelerator-hanxu/openfhe/bulid/lib: ../../lib/libOPENFHEcore.so.1.4.0 -fopenmp -ldl /opt/xilinx/xrt/lib/libxrt_coreutil.so -luuid -lpthread
